title: Huaxin Tech Service Quality Complaint
description: Huaxin Tech (CUS-003) Director Zhang complains that our service response times have been severely exceeding targets. Average technical support ticket response time exceeds 48 hours, far beyond the SLA commitment of 24 hours. Last month's system outage caused 6 hours of business interruption for the client. Frequent account manager turnover with inadequate handovers. Customer is highly agitated and threatening to suspend contract renewal.

title: Mingda Group Delivery Delay Complaint
description: Mingda Group (CUS-001) James Wang reports that the system integration project delivered last quarter was delayed by two weeks, impacting the client's internal project timeline. Customer requests 50,000 yuan compensation for additional costs caused by the delay.

title: Botong IT Product Defect Report
description: Botong IT (CUS-004) Manager Zhao reports that the data analytics platform has a serious defect causing data statistics to deviate by more than 5%, affecting Q4 decision reports. Technical team has confirmed it is an algorithm module bug. Customer demands immediate fix and 150,000 yuan compensation.

title: Lianxiang Innovation Product Experience Issue
description: Lianxiang Innovation (CUS-005) Leo Liu reports poor product user experience. Multiple improvement suggestions submitted but not adopted. Customer considering switching suppliers and requesting 200,000 yuan compensation. Internally forwarded by Sales Dept. Kevin Li.

title: Tianyu Media Customer Service Dissatisfaction
description: Tianyu Media (CUS-002) Michelle Li reports that when contacting customer service about a billing inquiry, wait time exceeded 30 minutes and the service representative was not sufficiently professional. Customer requests 30,000 yuan compensation and improved customer service response times.
